title: OJCP CandidateContext
description: Schema for a consent-scoped candidate profile passed by agents for personalized search and fit scoring.

consent_scope.description: The scope of consent granted by the candidate for use of this data.

remote_ok.description: Whether the candidate is open to remote work.

employment_type_preference.description: Preferred employment types. Standard values: full_time, part_time, contract, internship, temporary. Additional values MAY be used.

work_authorization.description: Work authorization status (e.g., US_citizen, permanent_resident, visa_required).

resume_embedding_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of a resume embedding vector, enabling semantic match scoring without transmitting the full resume.

name.description: Candidate's full name. Only include when consent_scope is 'application_prefill' or 'full_profile'.

email.description: Candidate's contact email. Only include when consent_scope is 'application_prefill' or 'full_profile'.

resume_url.description: URL to the candidate's resume document. Only include when consent_scope is 'application_prefill' or 'full_profile'.
